full_text_rationale: Full text describes MACOG using a Memory Curator that stores verified Infrastructure-as-Code tuples and typed motifs with metadata, retrieves them during later plan/compile steps, and evaluates the multi-agent IaC generator on IaC-Eval with metrics and ablations.
extractor_notes: Fresh search architecture extraction batch 006; controlled-comparison and quality status remain pending aggregate recomputation.
autores: Rana Nameer Hussain Khan, Dawood Wasif, Jin-Hee Cho, Ali Butt
titulo: Multi-Agent Code-Orchestrated Generation for Reliable Infrastructure-as-Code
formato_armazenamento: Memory Curator stores verified Infrastructure-as-Code tuples (P,T,Pi) with metadata, indexes typed motifs in a symbolic catalog and dense store, and returns typed motifs rather than raw code text for later planning and compilation.
framework_agente: MACOG multi-agent IaC generation architecture with Architect, Provider Harmonizer, Engineer, Reviewer, Security Prover, Cost and Capacity Planner, DevOps, and Memory Curator
llm_utilizado: GPT-5, Gemini-2.5 Pro, GPT-4, GPT-3.5-turbo, Gemini 2.0 Flash, Magicoder, WizardCoder, CodeLlama
metricas_desempenho: IaC-Eval score, BLEU, CodeBERTScore, LLM-judge score, ablation scores
baseline_comparado: Few-shot, chain-of-thought, multi-turn, RAG, and MACOG ablations without specialized agents/components.
tamanho_memoria_ao_longo_tempo: Verified tuples and typed motifs can be accumulated in symbolic and dense stores; no growth curve or memory size limit is reported.
resultado_principal: MACOG improves IaC-Eval over prompt-only and RAG baselines. GPT-5 improves from 54.90 with RAG to 74.02 with MACOG, and Gemini-2.5 Pro improves from 43.56 with RAG to 60.13 with MACOG.
desempenho_vs_baseline: GPT-5 MACOG reaches 74.02 IaC-Eval, BLEU 11.86, CodeBERTScore 80.54, and LLM-judge 94.10. Ablations reduce IaC-Eval, including -Engineer at 64.89, -Security Prover at 61.45, -DevOps at 56.93, and -Memory Curator at 72.17.
custo_vs_baseline: NR; system includes a Cost and Capacity Planner but no extracted per-task monetary cost is reported.
limitacoes: Evaluation is focused on Terraform/IaC generation; no source release or monetary/token cost data captured; memory-curator contribution is positive but smaller than some other component ablations.
ameacas_validade: IaC-Eval benchmark design, synthetic/task distribution, LLM-judge evaluation, Terraform/provider versioning, and multi-agent orchestration choices may affect external validity.
